name: i2c_master
core_function: I2C master controller with software-visible command/status registers and open-drain SCL/SDA controls.
algorithm: Keep register decode, byte controller, and bit controller as separate conceptual blocks. Use prescale registers to
structure: Separate software register decode from byte-level and bit-level protocol controllers.
Model SCL/SDA as open-drain: drive low or release, never actively drive high.
Clear one-shot command bits when byte transfer completes or arbitration is lost.
Latch status bits such as rxack, transfer-in-progress, bus busy, and interrupt pending.
